tr.td: Hematocrit [Volume Fraction] of Blood by calculation

Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild normocytic, normochromic anemia (low hemoglobin and hematocrit, normal MCV and MCH), with normal leukocyte and platelet counts. However, platelet mean volume and distribution width are elevated, which may indicate increased platelet turnover or activation. Further clinical correlation and investigation for underlying causes of anemia and platelet changes are recommended.
Hematocrit [Volume Fraction] of Blood by calculation
